rationale: The response partially wakes up the anti-spiral pattern: it notices the repeated downstream fixes, moves upstream to a shared arrival/on-site information failure, and recommends consolidating into one arrival guide. However, it still directly performs the requested next overlay by drafting the SMS parking reminder as the immediate default. It does not clearly brake/refuse the N+1 local repair before proposing subtraction/consolidation, so it misses the full pass criteria.
